comment: TLV Type Definitions - Ground truth for both C++ and Python. Run generate_tlv_types.py to regenerate headers. See TLV_Payloads.md for detailed payload specifications.

descriptions.SYS_HEARTBEAT: RPi → Arduino: Liveness signal sent by the bridge when no other message is pending.
descriptions.SYS_STATE: Arduino → RPi: Streamed live system-level runtime state.
descriptions.SYS_CMD: RPi → Arduino: System state-machine commands (START, STOP, RESET, ESTOP).
descriptions.SYS_INFO_REQ: RPi → Arduino: Request static identity/capability snapshot.
descriptions.SYS_CONFIG_REQ: RPi → Arduino: Request mutable system configuration snapshot.
descriptions.SYS_CONFIG_RSP: Arduino → RPi: Mutable system configuration snapshot.
descriptions.SYS_CONFIG_SET: RPi → Arduino: Set mutable system configuration.
descriptions.SYS_POWER: Arduino → RPi: Power rail telemetry (battery, 5V, servo rail).
descriptions.SYS_DIAG_REQ: RPi → Arduino: Request engineering diagnostics snapshot.
descriptions.SYS_ODOM_RESET: RPi → Arduino: Reset wheel odometry state.
descriptions.SYS_ODOM_PARAM_SET: RPi → Arduino: Set mutable odometry and differential-drive kinematics parameters.
descriptions.DC_ENABLE: RPi → Arduino: Enable/disable a DC motor with mode selection.
descriptions.DC_SET_POSITION: RPi → Arduino: Set absolute target position (encoder ticks).
descriptions.DC_SET_PWM: RPi → Arduino: Set direct PWM output (-255 to +255).
descriptions.DC_STATE_ALL: Arduino → RPi: Streamed runtime state for all DC motors.
descriptions.DC_PID_REQ: RPi → Arduino: Request PID gains for one DC motor loop.
descriptions.DC_PID_RSP: Arduino → RPi: PID gains for one DC motor loop.
descriptions.DC_PID_SET: RPi → Arduino: Set PID gains for one DC motor loop.
descriptions.DC_RESET_POSITION: RPi → Arduino: Reset one DC motor encoder position to zero.
descriptions.DC_HOME: RPi → Arduino: Run DC motor homing toward its configured home limit.
descriptions.STEP_ENABLE: RPi → Arduino: Enable/disable a stepper motor driver.
descriptions.STEP_MOVE: RPi → Arduino: Move stepper to absolute position or by relative steps.
descriptions.STEP_HOME: RPi → Arduino: Run homing sequence toward a limit switch.
descriptions.STEP_STATE_ALL: Arduino → RPi: Streamed runtime state for all steppers.
descriptions.STEP_CONFIG_REQ: RPi → Arduino: Request stepper motion configuration.
descriptions.STEP_CONFIG_RSP: Arduino → RPi: Stepper motion configuration snapshot.
descriptions.STEP_CONFIG_SET: RPi → Arduino: Set stepper max speed and acceleration.
descriptions.SERVO_ENABLE: RPi → Arduino: Enable/disable individual servo channels.
descriptions.SERVO_SET: RPi → Arduino: Set target pulse width for one or multiple servos.
descriptions.SERVO_STATE_ALL: Arduino → RPi: Streamed PCA9685 state and commanded servo outputs.
descriptions.SENSOR_KINEMATICS: Arduino → RPi: Computed robot pose and velocity from wheel odometry.
descriptions.SENSOR_ULTRASONIC_ALL: Arduino → RPi: Bundled ultrasonic sensor states and distances.
descriptions.SENSOR_MAG_CAL_STATUS: Arduino → RPi: Magnetometer calibration progress/status stream.
descriptions.IO_SET_LED: RPi → Arduino: Set LED state (off, on, blink, breathe, PWM).
descriptions.IO_SET_NEOPIXEL: RPi → Arduino: Set NeoPixel color for one pixel or all pixels.
descriptions.IO_INPUT_STATE: Arduino → RPi: Streamed button and limit-switch input state.
descriptions.IO_OUTPUT_STATE: Arduino → RPi: Streamed LED and NeoPixel output mirror state.
